/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/SoftClip_VST3.dir/link.d  -o SoftClip_artefacts/VST3/SoftClip.vst3/Contents/x86_64-linux/SoftClip.so CMakeFiles/SoftClip_VST3.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SoftClip_VST3.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SoftClip_VST3.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_ARA.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SoftClip_VST3.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_LV2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SoftClip_VST3.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Standalone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SoftClip_VST3.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Unity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SoftClip_VST3.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SoftClip_VST3.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST3.cpp.o  SoftClip_artefacts/libSoftClip_SharedCode.a /usr/lib/libfontconfig.so /usr/lib/libfreetype.so -lrt -ldl -lpthread
